title: Quran, Sura 107: Al-Ma'un
description: Sura 107 (Al-Ma'un: Small Kindnesses) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 107 (Al-Ma'un: Small Kindnesses) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense? For that is the one who drives away the orphan, and does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
